title: Poachers
description: A mod that adds poachers to minecraft!
body:
Welcome to Poachers!

This is a simple Fabric mod made for 1.21.8 that just simply adds poachers!

                               This mod requires Fabric API
                            https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api

To the poachers they have 3 variants:

- The Stabber (holds a horn dagger). 
- The Blower (blow darts that gives you weakness, slowness, nausea and poison).
- The Harvester (holds alot of food and meat will attack with his bare hands if given the chance).
- The Patrol (can spawn in forests with 2 stabbers and 2 blowers).
-They all attack farm animals like horses, donkeys, goats, sheeps, pigs, cows, chickens and villagers and golems.

To the other things this mods adds more items like:

- Cow horn (can sometime drop with a 30% to 40% chance to drop when killing a cow).
- Sharpened Horn (can be crafted with a cow horn and 2 flint it deals 2.5 damage but only 50 durability).
- Horn Dagger (can be crafted with a stick, 1 string and a sharpened horn, it deals 5 damage with an attack speed of 1.8 which makes it an frenzy type weapon).
- Poacher's hut (a new structure that can be found in forest and has some decent loot if your looking for for food).
